title: Same query results are inconsistent on TiKV and TiFlash when using complex predicate
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 FLOAT, c2 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, c3 DATE DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 1.5, 'test');
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 BIGINT UNSIGNED, c1 DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, c2 TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM t2 JOIN t3 ON t2.c0 = CAST(t3.c0 AS SIGNED) WHERE t2.c1 IS NOT NULL AND t3.c2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent query results between TiKV and TiFlash
